response.justification: Strong technical breadth with 20+ years of development experience across web, mobile, embedded, and open-source projects, plus relevant Linux/Python-adjacent and architecture exposure. However, the resume lists only 'Basic' German, which is well below the required C1 proficiency, and there's limited evidence of formal team leadership or executive-level mentoring required for a Head of Development role.
strengths: Deep multi-stack engineering experience including Linux, open-source platforms (GISCollective), and architecture
Founder-level ownership of an open-source GIS platform demonstrating end-to-end system design
Track record of mentoring via workshops, talks, and courses (Selenium, TDD, Web Internals)
concerns: German listed as 'Basic' — fails the C1 minimum requirement
No explicit Head-of-Development or formal team-leadership tenure shown
UML and formal requirements-management expertise not evidenced on the resume

key_factors.factor: Broad senior engineering and open-source/Linux background
